title: Ancient China
description: Test your knowledge of Ancient Chinese empires!

assessment_items.question_content:
During the Shang Dynasty, people used oracle bones

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: An oracle is someone who makes predictions.

choices.content: to try to tell the future

assessment_items.question_content:
Bronze, a metal alloy mastered by Shang Dynasty smiths, had an advantage over copper tools and weapons in that

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Bronze is an alloy of copper and tin.

choices.content: it was harder and stronger than copper
it was cheaper and less labor-intensive to smelt
it was more readily available than copper

assessment_items.question_content:
What's one way in which Shang architecture reinforced the social distinctions of their society?


[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Shang society was stratified by social class; elites and the lower-class residents did not live together.

choices.content: The elites and craftsmen lived within the inner walls of the city, separated from lower-class residents who lived within the outer walls
Elites and lower-class people lived together in shared residential areas
Elites and craftsmen lived in the higher floors of buildings while lower-class people lived on the bottom floors

assessment_items.question_content:
What best explains Shang military success?

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: The Shang were one of the first civilizations to make bronze.

choices.content: They had a highly developed spy network, giving them information about their enemies
They had advanced technology, such as chariots, compound bow, and bronze weapons
They hired foreign mercenaries to do all of their fighting

assessment_items.question_content:
Why did early Chinese civilization arise in the Yellow River Valley?

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Civilizations are built on surplus food production.

choices.content: The region had a high concentration of loess, a very fertile soil, which allowed for productive agriculture
The region was considered sacred to pre-agricultural inhabitants
The region had the only habitable climate in China
